common.title: Title
table.no_templates: No templates yet. Browse the gallery below to get started.
gallery.description: Starter templates you can customise to match your business. Preview any template or click Use Template to add it to your site.
gallery.no_matches: No gallery templates match your filters.
layout.title: Receipt Templates
layout.description: Design and manage the receipts printed at your point of sale. Templates use HTML or ESC/POS format and can be fully customised.
modal.no_preview: No preview available. Create a POS order first.
modal.render_error: Thermal template rendering error. Check your XML syntax.
tags.receipt_printer_tip: Designed for thermal receipt printers like Epson or Star. If you don't have a receipt printer, use a Browser template instead.
tags.browser_tip: Prints using your browser's built-in print dialog. Works with any printer but requires a browser window.
tags.80mm_tip: Formatted for 80mm (standard) thermal paper. Most receipt printers use this size.
tags.58mm_tip: Formatted for 58mm (narrow) thermal paper. Check your printer specs if you're not sure which size you need.
tags.offline_tip: This template renders on the device without needing a server connection. Faster and works even if your internet goes down.
tags.server_tip: This template needs your WordPress server to generate the receipt. Requires an active internet connection and may be slower.
tags.legacy_php_tip: This template uses the older PHP engine. Consider switching to a newer template for faster, offline-capable receipts.
